description: Per-feature rollout planning: feature flags, backward compatibility, staged exposure (internal → percentage → full), migration sequencing (expand-migrate-contract), and a rollback path stated BEFORE ship. Includes /rollout:plan.

Per-feature rollout planning: feature flags, backward compatibility, staged exposure (internal → percentage → full), migration sequencing (expand-migrate-contract), and a rollback path stated BEFORE ship. Includes /rollout:plan.

Codex fidelity: 1 faithful, 1 degraded, 0 dropped surface(s).
